description: Legal document. Location: Al-Maḥalla. Involves [...] b. Yefet ha-Zaqen and [...] b. Peraḥya ha-Levi ha-Zaqen and contains the curious phrase "I have leased myself to him (akraytuhu rūḥī) for the whole year for 1 dinar." Needs examination. See also Goitein's notes.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
